postgres_sort_notes: DESC is not required for a fully backward-scannable B-tree.
Column order matching keyset pagination matters more than DESC markers.
Do not rewrite OR keyset predicates to tuple compares without measured gain.

routes.index_gate: Propose index only if scan/sort/filter is a material share of route latency AND before/after on the same representative dataset shows a real benefit. Seq Scan alone (even at >10k rows) is not sufficient.
